title: Clean MC
description: This modpack contains all the mods you need for a successful Minecraft session. From Zoomify to 3D skin layers – here you'll find mods that will enhance your gameplay.
body:
This modpack contains all the mods you need for a great Minecraft session. From Zoomify to 3D skin layers, you'll find mods here that will enhance your gameplay and boost performance.


**Don't forget to apply the texture packs.**
